summary: Iteration 92 - Tested pagination features for stock/entries, stock/usage, supplier-payments + public order tracking with URL params + QR code on receipt. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All features working.

suppliers.py pagination (lines 139-161): Correctly implements paginated response with supplier_id filter support
CashierPOSPage.jsx (line 772-778): QRCodeSVG correctly implemented with qrcode.react v4.2.0 library

seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 92 features verified: 1) Stock entries pagination returns 8 records with {data, total, page, limit, pages}, 2) Stock usage pagination returns 9 records, 3) Supplier payments pagination working, 4) /track-order?id=xxx auto-searches order from URL params (QR code support), 5) CashierPOS receipt dialog has QRCodeSVG component with data-testid='receipt-qr-code', 6) Online Platforms and Menu Items pages working (regression)
